scripts.type-check: cd packages/arcadia-ts && tsc --noEmit && cd ../.. && cd playground/astra-naught && tsc --noEmit && cd ../verdant-descent && tsc --noEmit && cd ../babylon-estate && tsc --noEmit
scripts.spinfall: wasm-pack build packages/arcadia-rs --target web && cd playground/astra-naught && bun run dev
scripts.downleaf: wasm-pack build packages/arcadia-rs --target web && cd playground/verdant-descent && bun run dev
scripts.cipher-room: wasm-pack build packages/arcadia-rs --target web && cd playground/babylon-estate && bun run dev
scripts.format: bun format:rs && bun format:projects && bun format:templates
scripts.format:projects: cd playground/astra-naught && bun format && cd ../verdant-descent && bun format && cd ../babylon-estate && bun format
scripts.format:templates: cd templates/spinfall-arena && bun format && cd ../downleaf && bun format && cd ../cipher-room && bun format
scripts.lint: bun lint:rs && bun lint:projects && bun lint:templates
scripts.lint:projects: cd playground/astra-naught && bun lint && cd ../verdant-descent && bun lint && cd ../babylon-estate && bun lint
scripts.lint:templates: cd templates/spinfall-arena && bun lint && cd ../downleaf && bun lint && cd ../cipher-room && bun lint
scripts.qa: bun type-check && bun lint && bun format &&  bun run test
